2026-05-24T18:37:54.8422988Z     price: float

2026-05-24T18:37:54.8423396Z 
2026-05-24T18:37:54.8423597Z # In-memory storage (replace with database like SQLAlchemy or MongoDB)
2026-05-24T18:37:54.8423966Z items_db = {}
2026-05-24T18:37:54.8424155Z next_id = 1
2026-05-24T18:37:54.8424256Z

2026-05-24T18:37:54.8424949Z     return {"message": "Welcome to the FastAPI Server!"}
